title: Syrian-Style Xenial Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful rice pilaf dish inspired by Syrian cuisine, infused with the warmth of xenial spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the xenial spice blend and Syrian pilaf spice mix; cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the rice and stir to coat the rice in the spice mixture, about 2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
